blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
